TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Will_Allen, title = Will_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Will_Allen} }

S.FORM: Will Allen htu squw kawas 1949 neng 2 gat 8 nici, htuw beh qalang na Maryland. hiya' ga mzuyzi mari te NBA Amirika saral. kinwagiq nya ga 201 cm,ki'an nya pzyuan mari ga pglan te glan balay. Maki sa kawas tay 1971 sensyu NBA,wal galun kya na Baltimore Orioles, minspayat mtbwiru' ga, maki te 60 binkgan lalu niya ru mzyup kya sa NBA la. ana ga wal nha ini ktay qu kibbqan nya mzyuwi mari. nanak maki minpitu, nwah niya mspung pinsspung na NBA G League. Maki sa kawas te 1977 lga wan malax kya pinzyu'an niya mari la.babaw nya lga musa muzit mqwas sa biru na Hakase na zyuwaw na pqumah. Misuw qani lga semong balay na Nogyo Hakase la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Will Allen htu squw kawas 1949 neng 2 gat 8 nici, htuw beh qalang na Maryland. hiya' ga mzuyzi mari te NBA Amirika saral. kinwagiq nya ga 201 cm,ki'an nya pzyuan mari ga pglan te glan balay. Maki sa kawas tay 1971 sensyu NBA,wal galun kya na Baltimore Orioles, minspayat mtbwiru' ga, maki te 60 binkgan lalu niya ru mzyup kya sa NBA la. ana ga wal nha ini ktay qu kibbqan nya mzyuwi mari. nanak maki minpitu, nwah niya mspung pinsspung na NBA G League. Maki sa kawas te 1977 lga wan malax kya pinzyu'an niya mari la.babaw nya lga musa muzit mqwas sa biru na Hakase na zyuwaw na pqumah. Misuw qani lga semong balay na Nogyo Hakase la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: will allen ħtu s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ **** neŋ * ɣat * niʦ~ʨi, ħtuw βeħ qalaŋ na marjlan*. ħijaʔ ɣa mzujzi mari te nβa amirika s~ɕaral. kinwaɣiq nja ɣa *** ʦ~ʨm,kiʔan nja pzjuan mari ɣa pɣlan te ɣlan βalaj. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** s~ɕens~ɕju nβa,wal ɣalun kja na βaltimore orioles~ɕ, mins~ɕpajat mtβwiruʔ ɣa, maki te ** βinkɣan lalu nija ru mzjup kja s~ɕa nβa la. ana ɣa wal nħa ini ktaj qu kiββqan nja mzjuwi mari. nanak maki minpitu, nwaħ nija ms~ɕpuŋ pins~ɕs~ɕpuŋ na nβa ɣ leaɣue. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ te **** lɣa wan malax kja pinzjuʔan nija mari la.βaβaw nja lɣa mus~ɕa muzit mqwas~ɕ s~ɕa βiru na ħakas~ɕe na zjuwaw na pqumaħ. mis~ɕuw qani lɣa s~ɕemoŋ βalaj na noɣjo ħakas~ɕe la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
